title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
